title: Shark Tank Server Pack
description: A create based modpack for shark tank server
body:
This is a create based modpack that is for my server, Shark Tank. 

Join the discord: https://discord.gg/FBreKS6HZN

About the Pack:
This modpack revolves around the Create Mod, allowing players to build complex machines, automation systems, and stunning mechanical structures. Most of the other included mods are either Create add-ons or mods that complement its gameplay style—enhancing creativity, automation, exploration, and quality of life.

About the Server:
This is a whitelisted server, and you must join the Discord to apply and gain access. We focus on a friendly, collaborative multiplayer experience with a create delivery network and a shopping district.



Noticable Mods:

- Create (obviously)
- Farmer's delight
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Sodium and Iris
- JEI and Jade
- Xaero's minimaps and maps
- Simple voice chat
